steps.action: Create an empty save directory for Crossref download output
Run `search-paper-cli download --source crossref ...` with metadata-only paper JSON
steps.expected: CLI returns a structured non-success informational/unsupported result
steps.observed: exit 3, state=informational, message=source "crossref" does not provide direct download through search metadata

steps.action: Inspect the requested save directory after the command
steps.expected: No fake or stray files are created

assertions.title: Metadata-only read returns explicit non-full-text behavior

steps.action: Create an empty save directory for Crossref read output
steps.observed: Directory created empty before the run

steps.action: Run `search-paper-cli read --source crossref ...` with metadata-only paper JSON
steps.expected: CLI returns a machine-readable informational/non-full-text state using the shared `state` field family
steps.observed: exit 3, state=informational, message=source "crossref" only exposes metadata through search at this stage

steps.action: Inspect the requested save directory after the command

assertions.title: Hard-unsupported sources fail as unsupported without side effects

steps.action: Create empty save directories for DBLP download and read
steps.observed: Both directories were created empty before invocation

steps.expected: CLI returns a normalized unsupported result
steps.observed: exit 3, state=unsupported, message=source "dblp" direct download is not supported

steps.expected: CLI returns a normalized unsupported result
steps.observed: exit 3, state=unsupported, message=source "dblp" direct read is not supported

steps.action: Inspect both save directories after the commands

assertions.title: Standalone Unpaywall retrieval remains capability-limited

steps.action: Run `search-paper-cli search --source unpaywall 10.1371/journal.pone.0266782` with no Unpaywall email configured
steps.expected: CLI exits 0 and returns zero records

steps.action: Run the same search with a temp `HOME` global config file providing the assigned settings
steps.expected: CLI exits 0 and returns one metadata-only Unpaywall record

steps.action: Run `download` and `read` directly against the Unpaywall source with the configured global config
steps.expected: Both commands return unsupported non-success results and create no files
steps.observed: download: exit 3, state=unsupported; read: exit 3, state=unsupported; save dirs after run: download=[], read=[]

evidence.network: Live configured Unpaywall DOI search surfaced `unexpected status 422` through the CLI error payload.

assertions.issues: Clean-env search correctly returned zero records and direct download/read remained unsupported, but configured Unpaywall DOI search exited 4 with `errors.unpaywall = "unexpected status 422"` instead of returning one metadata-only record.

assertions.title: IEEE and ACM retrieval stay as gated skeletons

steps.expected: IEEE becomes enabled while retrieval capabilities remain unsupported skeletons

steps.action: Run `download` and `read` for IEEE with the key set
steps.expected: Both commands fail clearly as unimplemented skeleton retrieval behavior with no files created
steps.observed: download exit 3, state=unsupported; read exit 3, state=unsupported; save dirs after run: download=[], read=[]

steps.expected: ACM becomes enabled while retrieval capabilities remain unsupported skeletons

steps.action: Run `download` and `read` for ACM with the key set
steps.expected: Both commands fail clearly as unimplemented skeleton retrieval behavior with no files created
steps.observed: download exit 3, state=unsupported; read exit 3, state=unsupported; save dirs after run: download=[], read=[]
